title: Artificial Succulent Ornament in White Cement Face Planter Small Potted Fake Plant for Indoor Outdoor Decor & Gift
features: 😊Unique Artistic Design – This eye-catching planter features a serene face sculpture, adding a touch of modern minimalism and artistic flair to your space.
😊Compact Size for Any Space – Measuring 8cm wide and 11cm high, it’s ideal for desks, shelves, bathrooms, window sills, or small patios.
😊Premium Cement Material – Made from durable white cement with a textured finish, this pot brings a natural yet refined look to both indoor and outdoor settings.
😊NO Maintenance Greenery – The lifelike artificial succulent requires no watering or sunlight, perfect for busy lifestyles or low-light environments.
😊A Gift for Any Occasion – Complements boho, Scandinavian, or contemporary interiors; great gift idea for housewarming, office decor or yards.
description: Product Description The planter’s serene facial expression and textured cement finish blend art and nature Offering a modern statement for any room. Whether placed indoors or outdoors. Bring a calming, stylish vibe to your home or workspace with this unique succulent.
